review: legit useless, trying to make an order on the mcdonalds app is impossible, nothing works, might as well use doordash, their courier.

makes the whole order process a major pain, often giving up because the app is glitching and wont give valid code, ita slow, it kicks you out and you need to open email to log in... AND ALL THAT HASTLE TO FIND OUT MY POINTS HAVE BEEN EXPIRING ALL ALONG!!!! 👎🏽🤬
